testInfo.summary:
This test case validates the metadata exposed by the credential issuer,
as defined in the OpenID for Verifiable Credential Issuance (OpenID4VCI) specification.

This test will send a credential issuer metadata request with content-type: application/json.

results.msg: Found credential configuration with a format supported by HAIP
Found only credential configurations with supported formats
Found explicit authorization_servers list with 1 entries.
Derived authorization server 0 metadata endpoint URL from OAuth authorization server issuer.
Fetched authorization server metadata from single server
Verify OAuth Authorization Server Metadata Response
OAuth Authorization Server metadata input is valid
Contents of 'token_endpoint_auth_methods_supported' in discovery document matches expectations.
Authorization Server metadata contains required client attestation signing algorithm values
scope is defined for all supported credential configurations, therefore there is no need for authorization_details_types_supported in oauth authorization server metadata
Alias has now been claimed by another test
